mapper.select: SELECT tagId, tagName, status, usageCount, createdAt, lastUpdatedAt FROM tag ORDER BY tagName ASC, tagId ASC
SELECT tagId, tagName, status, usageCount, createdAt, lastUpdatedAt FROM tag WHERE status = 'ACTIVE' ORDER BY usageCount DESC, tagName ASC
SELECT tagId, tagName, status, usageCount, createdAt, lastUpdatedAt FROM tag WHERE status = #{status} ORDER BY tagName ASC, tagId ASC
SELECT tagId, tagName, status, usageCount, createdAt, lastUpdatedAt FROM tag WHERE tagId = #{tagId}

SELECT tagId, tagName, status, usageCount, createdAt, lastUpdatedAt FROM tag WHERE tagId IN
#{tagId}
SELECT tagId, tagName, status, usageCount, createdAt, lastUpdatedAt FROM tag WHERE tagName = #{tagName} LIMIT 1
SELECT tagId, tagName, status, usageCount, createdAt, lastUpdatedAt FROM tag WHERE LOWER(tagName) = LOWER(#{tagName}) LIMIT 1

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM tag WHERE LOWER(TRIM(tagName)) = LOWER(TRIM(#{tagName}))
AND tagId != #{excludedTagId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO tag ( tagName, status, usageCount, createdAt, lastUpdatedAt ) VALUES ( #{tagName}, #{status}, #{usageCount}, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP, CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.update: UPDATE tag t SET t.usageCount = ( SELECT COUNT(*) FROM resourceTag rt WHERE rt.tagId = t.tagId ) WHERE t.tagId = #{tagId}
